article_title: Servo Reaches crates.io With v0.1.0, Giving Rust Developers an Embeddable Browser Engine With Long-Term Support

content_preview.title: Servo Reaches crates.io With v0.1.0, Giving Rust Developers an Embeddable Browser Engine With Long-Term Support
content_preview.summary: The Servo project publishes its first crates.io release, making the Rust-native browser engine available as an embeddable library with a WebView API and a six-month LTS cycle.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The Servo project released version 0.1.0 of its browser engine on April 13, 2026, marking the first time the engine has been [published to crates.io](https://servo.org/blog/2026/04/13/servo-0.1.0-release/) as an embeddable Rust library. The release signals a shift in Servo's positioning from an experimental standalone browser engine to a reusable component that any Rust application can integrate for web rendering.
